## A. PolicyDenial constructors

- [crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs](/Users/daniel/workspace/repos/orbit/crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs): synthesizes a new denial event (`let denial = LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial { ... }`) inside `EnforcedAuditSink::emit` for disallowed `ToolCallRequested` events.
